prompt: isometric pixel-art game tiles for a top-down RPG map. Each tile shows a DIFFERENT huge towering object as the clear MAIN SUBJECT — prominent, detailed and standing tall, on only a small low patch of clear blue water. The object dominates and fills the tile; keep the ground base minimal and thin — NOT a tall dirt pedestal or block with a small object on top. Go for maximum variety — different shapes, species, ages and conditions, no two tiles alike.
